<!-- Copilot reads AGENTS.md natively. This file exists for Copilot-specific additions. -->
<!-- The main mandate is at ../../AGENTS.md — do not duplicate content here. -->

## Copilot-specific notes

- Copilot reads `AGENTS.md` automatically.
- SDD slash commands are mirrored in `.github/agents/speckit.*.agent.md`.
- Run `npm run check:mandates` to verify AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md are synced.
- Ponytail (if installed) auto-injects via the Copilot plugin — do not paste the ruleset here.
